hero.title: Professional web solutions
hero.description: From custom websites for small and medium-sized businesses to scalable full-stack applications.

about.heading: Software Engineer
about.headingHighlight: with a passion for the web.
about.p1: Quality is always at the core: clean code, thoughtful architecture and comprehensive testing. I deliver results that make an impact.
about.p2: With an open, transparent communication style, I guide clients and teams from the first idea through to the finished product.

services.heading: What I build for you
services.subheading: From simple websites to complex full-stack applications — I build digital solutions that work.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: Professional, modern websites for businesses — responsive, fast, and tailored to your target audience.

webapps.title: Web Applications
webapps.description: Scalable full-stack applications with Angular and Java/Spring Boot — from idea to finished product.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Modern user interfaces with Angular and TypeScript — performant, accessible and well-designed.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Robust REST APIs and backend systems with Java and Spring Boot — cleanly structured and well documented.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: Automated tests with Jest and Cypress, CI/CD pipelines and code reviews for sustainably maintainable code.

projects.heading: Selected Projects
projects.subheading: A look at my work — professional solutions for businesses and personal projects.

notification.title: Notification Platform
notification.description: Modernization of a central platform for displaying and managing notifications from various business applications.
notification.h2: REST API with Spring Boot & PostgreSQL
notification.h3: Comprehensive test coverage with Jest and Cypress

kanzlei.description: Contribution to the development of a cloud-based total solution for law firm management.

gitlab.description: Conception and development of a bot to automate the deployment process in GitLab merge requests.

blog.heading: From my practice
blog.subheading: What I'm working on — experiences, learnings and thoughts from everyday development.

footer.tagline: Full-Stack Developer · Custom web solutions for small and medium-sized businesses and enterprises.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimerText: The contents of this site have been created with the greatest possible care. However, no guarantee can be given for the correctness, completeness and timeliness of the contents.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: This website processes personal data only to the extent necessary to provide the website and enable contact.
privacy.section2Text: When you submit the contact form, the entered data is passed exclusively to your local email program (mailto). No server-side storage or transfer to third parties takes place.
privacy.section3Text: This website stores your language and theme preferences exclusively locally in the browser (localStorage). This data does not leave your device.
privacy.section4Text: This website uses Google Fonts. When loading the fonts, your IP address is transmitted to Google. For more information, please refer to Google's privacy policy.
